body_txt: Cupid (or Cupidon in some other languages), the personification of Love at First Sight . Always looking for couples to shoot with his arrows to make them fall in love. Sometimes, he misfires and hits the wrong person. The results are sometimes Played for Laughs , sometimes not. Unsurprisingly, the day Cupid often does his "work" is Valentine's Day. See also Love Goddess , Love Potion , and Putto .
